message:
feat: expand RGC audit/contract test coverage and add shape lattice bundle CLI

Expand integration test suites and documentation for three RGC gates:

- docs_help_surface_audit: add new test cases and update V1 audit
  documentation and JSON report artifacts.

- rgc_executable_compatibility_target_matrix: add new compatibility
  target test cases and update V1 documentation and JSON artifacts.

- rgc_react_capability_contract: add new React capability contract
  test cases and update V1 documentation and JSON artifacts.

- proof_backed_compression: add CompressionResult integration tests
  covering bytes_saved(), ratio bounds, serde roundtrip, dedup
  representative IDs, and error handling for large artifacts.

Add new shape transition lattice bundle CLI binary
(franken_shape_lattice_bundle.rs), CLI integration tests, and E2E
replay and runner scripts for the shape transition lattice gate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+root_dir="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
+mode="${1:-ci}"
+target_dir="${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-${root_dir}/target_rch_rgc_shape_transition_lattice}"
+artifact_root="${RGC_SHAPE_TRANSITION_LATTICE_ARTIFACT_ROOT:-artifacts/rgc_shape_transition_lattice}"
+run_stamp="$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)"
+
+run_rch() {
+  rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${target_dir}" "$@"
+}
+
+run_remote_binary() {
+  local out_dir="${artifact_root}/${run_stamp}"
+  run_rch cargo run -p frankenengine-engine --bin franken_shape_lattice_bundle -- --out-dir "${out_dir}"
+}
+
+case "${mode}" in
+  check)
+    run_rch cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --bin franken_shape_lattice_bundle --test shape_transition_lattice_cli
+    ;;
+  test)
+    run_rch cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test shape_transition_lattice_cli
+    ;;
+  clippy)
+    run_rch cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --bin franken_shape_lattice_bundle --test shape_transition_lattice_cli -- -D warnings
+    ;;
+  run)
+    run_remote_binary
+    ;;
+  ci)
+    run_rch cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --bin franken_shape_lattice_bundle --test shape_transition_lattice_cli
+    run_rch cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test shape_transition_lattice_cli
+    run_rch cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --bin franken_shape_lattice_bundle --test shape_transition_lattice_cli -- -D warnings
+    run_remote_binary
+    ;;
+  *)
+    echo "usage: ./scripts/run_rgc_shape_transition_lattice.sh [check|test|clippy|run|ci]" >&2
+    exit 2
+    ;;
+esac
